payload.title: Render wiring image assets
payload.summary: SVG and PNG rendering uses mermaid.ink over the network. Local-only mode still generates JSON, Markdown, HTML, and the pin table.

actions.label: Render all
actions.description: Allow network image rendering and produce SVG/PNG when available.

actions.label: Local only
actions.description: Skip network image rendering and produce local wiring artifacts only.

actions.label: Cancel
actions.description: Stop the optional wiring phase and keep the main workflow unchanged.
